creator: schily@schily.net
text:
Hi, you claim:

>cdrkit is an alternative to cdrtools with utf-8 support
>extend USE_CDRTOOLS for cdrkit 

please note that this is not correct.

cdrtools in contrary to wodim _does_ support utf-8 correctly.
You should better use the original software.

Because of many bugs and the fact that it is not maintained, wodim cannot be 
seen as a cdrtools alternative.

Jörg

--
